main.name: Paolo
main.occupation: 🧠 Technology Architect & AI/ML Engineer, specializing in scalable architectures, AI, blockchain, and cloud automation. I build efficient, sustainable systems that drive innovation
main.occupationTarget: 🌟 A key industry reference, blending strategy, agility, and impact. Advocate of AI & blockchain. Passionate about sustainable tech
main.description: 🤖 Conversational AI Expert |💡"Load" CM Founder, Designer & Developer |💻 Full Stack |🤼 People Developer |🎨 Senior Technology Architect @Accenture |☁️ Technology Cloud Architect |👨🏽‍💻 DevOps skills enthusiast |♻️ Agile SCRUM Developer |🔗 Blockchain Specialist  |🌲 Soustainability by technology Ambassador EUDR
main.bio: Cloud Solutions Architect and AI/ML Engineer with over seven years of experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade systems across cloud, integration, and artificial intelligence domains. Specialized in cloud-native architecture on AWS — spanning EKS, S3, API Gateway, and Cognito — with a strong track record in modernizing legacy stacks and building scalable, secure integration layers. Hands-on practitioner in applied AI: from deploying production RAG pipelines and local LLM inference with GGUF and llama.cpp, to building AI-powered automation for incident management and code migration.
main.big-bio: My name is Paolo, born in '88, and since 2018, I've been part of the dynamic world of Accenture. Throughout my career, I've immersed myself in a plethora of projects, languages, architectures, and roles, each shaping me into the versatile and forward-thinking innovator I am today. My journey in tech has not only been about adapting and learning; it's been a process of constant innovation and redefinition of what's possible. An essential daily habit that has been crucial to my success is my walking meditation. Every day, without fail, this practice helps me maintain calmness and focus, allowing me to approach challenges with clarity and innovate with intention. It's in these moments of tranquility that I find my greatest inspirations and the strength to keep pushing the boundaries of technology. My most precious childhood memory is of visiting the animals with my grandmother during vacations. Those moments, filled with dedication, effort, and love towards the creatures that depended so much on us, taught me valuable lessons early on. Experiencing the responsibility as a playful adventure instilled in me a profound respect for life and nature, values that I carry with me in everything I do. There's a place that I consider my 'second home'—a small balcony in an inaccessible house in a hamlet in the Val Maira. This secluded spot is where I find peace, inspiration, and a sense of timelessness that rejuvenates my soul. Here, I reconnect with myself, drawing inspiration from the serene landscape to fuel my passion for innovation and creativity. In my role at Accenture, I bring this blend of calm determination, inspired innovation, and deep-rooted values to every project I tackle. I am constantly on the lookout for the next challenge, ready to leverage my experiences and insights to make a meaningful impact in the tech world.

resume.skillmessage-old: A passionate Full Stack Software Developer having an experience with building Web and Mobile applications with JavaScript / Reactjs / Nodejs / React Native and some other cool libraries and frameworks

work.title: Cloud Solutions Architect — Application Stack Modernization (MiTur)
work.description: Leading the porting of an existing enterprise application stack from TIBCO BusinessWorks 6 (BW6) to Java Spring Boot microservices. Designed and implemented cloud-native architecture on AWS (S3, API Gateway, EKS). Leveraged AI-assisted code analysis tools for reverse-engineering legacy patterns.

work.title: Cloud Solutions Architect — Mobile & Backend Federation (FiberCop)
work.description: Architected a secure connectivity layer between mobile applications and heterogeneous backend systems using AWS API Gateway and Cognito. Implemented OAuth2/JWT-based token brokering for seamless cross-platform authentication without backend modifications.

work.title: Cloud Solutions Architect — Cloud Architecture Design & Migration (Dottor Max)
work.description: Designed end-to-end cloud architecture (RDS, S3, Lambda, ECS) for a pharmacy management platform. Produced detailed blueprints and defined a phased migration strategy from on-premises to AWS.

work.title: AI/ML Engineer — Local LLM Products with GGUF & Llama.cpp
work.description: Developed internal AI products using quantized language models (GGUF) via llama.cpp for on-premise inference. Implemented RAG pipelines and modular pipelines integrating vector stores (FAISS, ChromaDB).

work.title: AI/ML Engineer — Incident Management Automation (ENEL)
work.description: Designed an AI framework for autonomous incident detection and triage. Integrated AI models with InfluxDB and Grafana to reduce MTTR and trigger automated runbooks.

work.title: Cloud Solutions Architect — Data Orchestration for EUDR Compliance
work.description: Designed a cloud-native data orchestration framework integrated with TRACEMARK for raw material traceability. Established secure ERP integrations (SAP, Postgres) with AWS S3.

work.title: AI/ML Engineer — LLM and Generative AI
work.description: Research and implementation of LLMs using TensorFlow, PyTorch, and GGUF quantization techniques. Developed RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) solutions to enhance accuracy and context-awareness.

work.title: Software Architect and Team Lead
work.description: Supervised development teams for EUDR compliance and internal GenAI projects. Designed web applications using React and cloud-native solutions with AWS (S3, Cognito, API Gateway).

work.title: DevOps & Observability Specialist — Active Monitoring with InfluxDB
work.description: Architected an active monitoring system using InfluxDB and Python (pandas, influxdb_client) for metrics visualization. Containerized and orchestrated microservices with Docker and Kubernetes on AWS.

work.title: Blockchain Engineer & DevOps Specialist
work.description: Deployed custom blockchain networks using Hyperledger Besu. Wrote Solidity smart contracts for NFT management and developed backend services in Node.js and Java (Quarkus).

work.title: Application Development Senior Analyst
work.description: Developed web portals and energy market platforms for ENEL Italy and North America. Full-stack development with React and Java Spring Boot (microservices) on AWS. Acted as Scrum Master.

work.title: Application Development Analyst
work.description: Analysis and development of energy market platforms. Led the architectural migration from on-premises to AWS EC2 using SAS and J2EE technology stacks.

senior developer.definition: This figure creates the application components (programs) and the necessary data structures as defined by the technical specifications. He/she carries out unit tests of the modules developed and deals with aspects related to deployment/release management in production. He/she collaborates with the project team in preparing the systems and performance tests and he supports the preparation and execution of integration tests.
senior developer.mainResponsabilities: Guide the software quality and performance, Develop or modify the necessary application components and data structures as defined by the architecture shared with the system architect in accordance with the operability criteria, Create the development modules that interface with the DMS products using the appropriate development tool kits, all graphic objects (images, icons, buttons, effects, etc.), page layouts (texts, background, borders, etc.), animations, etc.• Produce or modify components for the automation of unit testing, in accordance with the methodologies intended to be used, Support the Analysts with functional analysis work on an occasional basis, Collaborate with the Analysts in designing the system and performance tests and support the preparation and execution of integration tests• Test the individual programs and participate in the testing of the respective procedures, Prepare or modify the “storyboard” for the presentation and browsing procedures, Manage anomalies found during functional testing/user testing/operational support, and direct the resolution of the problem by the development or maintenance group, Store and update all information (sources, tests, documents) relating to the life-cycle of the applications within Enel systems, Draw up and update the program documentation, Collaborate, if required, in defining and documenting the system architectures, Deals with any aspect related to the deploy/release management in production.
senior developer.specificSkills: Knowledge of the required environments, languages and development and programming tools. In-depth knowledge of the required programming language and the respective analysis, design, programming and testing techniques, General knowledge of the required architectures, DBMS and operational environments. , Knowledge of the techniques for the execution and implementation of unit and system tests., Knowledge of the functional aspect on the pertaining module., Knowledge of the Agile methodology. , Problem determination skills, Ability to optimize the code to minimize resource usage , Ability to write technical documentation and user manuals When the resource is involved in activity carried out in Agile, the following skills are requested: Do all necessary work to achieve the objectives of the sprint and the project release in accordance with the Vision and Done Set: Collaborate with the Product Owner to keep the Backlog up to date and with the right degree of detail, Estimate “User Stories” and other activities in the Backlog, Carry out analysis and design (including UX and architecture), Develop or customize the products within the scope, Develop tests within the scope (Unit, Integration, Performance, Function and Non-Functional)., Design testing cards, Develop test automation, Carry out automated and manual tests to ensure product quality, Document the solution’s life cycle in accordance with Enel standards

Design & Build.ita: Design-build è un sistema di consegna del progetto utilizzato nel settore delle costruzioni. È un metodo per fornire un progetto in cui i servizi di progettazione e costruzione sono contratti da una singola entità nota come progettista o costruttore
Design & Build.Traditional Project Delivery: The Owner must manage two separate contracts which all-too-often creates an adversarial relationship between the designer and the contractor. If something goes wrong or an unforeseen circumstance requires changes, the designer and contractor blame one another for the cost overruns or schedule changes, often leading to litigation and delays which add to the project cost.
Design & Build.Design-Build Project Delivery: The Owner manages only one contract with a single point of responsibility. The designer and contractor work together from the beginning, as a team, providing unified project recommendations to fit the Owner's schedule and budget. Any changes are addressed by the entire team, leading to collaborative problem-solving and innovation, not excuses or blame-shifting. While single-source contracting is the fundamental difference between design-build and the old ways, equally important is the culture of collaboration inherent in design-build.

Build Management.what: With the move to continuous integration and continuous delivery, build management has become an important part of the software development and testing lifecycle. Build management is the process of collecting all of the assets to be included in a software release, performing all the automated tasks to compile, build and test the system and then deploy onto the development and testing environments in preparation for staging.

SpringBoot.ita: Spring Boot è il framework per creare applicazioni basate sul framework Java Spring che sono subito pronte per ambienti di produzione e sono maggiormente utilizzate per creare microservizi
SpringBoot.eng: Spring Boot is an open source Java-based framework used to create a micro Service. It helps you to create Spring-powered, production-grade applications and services with absolute minimum fuss

J2EE.ita: La piattaforma Java™ 2, Enterprise Edition (J2EE) fornisce uno standard per lo sviluppo di applicazioni enterprise a più livelli
J2EE.eng: J2EE stands for Java 2 Platform, Enterprise Edition. J2EE is the standard platform for developing applications in the enterprise and is designed for enterprise applications that run on servers. J2EE provides APIs that let developers create workflows and make use of resources such as databases or web services. J2EE consists of a set of APIs. Developers can use these APIs to build applications for business computing.

Angular.ita: Angular 2+ (o semplicemente Angular) è un framework open source per lo sviluppo di applicazioni web con licenza MIT, evoluzione di AngularJS. Sviluppato principalmente da Google, la sua prima release è avvenuta il 14 settembre 2016. Angular è un framework per la realizzazione di interfacce utente, moderno, veloce, robusto e flessibile
Angular.eng: Angular is a platform for building mobile and desktop web applications. Angular is an open-source, JavaScript framework written in TypeScript. Google maintains it, and its primary purpose is to develop single-page applications

Atlassian.ita: Atlassian Corporation Plc è una compagnia di software enterprise che sviluppa prodotti per sviluppatori di software, project management e per la gestione dei contenuti. È nota soprattutto per la sua applicazione di tracciamento delle segnalazioni, Jira, e per l'applicazione wiki e collaborativa Confluence
Atlassian.eng: Atlassian Corporation is an Australian software development company for the IT industry. It is best known for its JIRA and Confluence bug tracking system. The company is headquartered in Seattle, USA. In total, the company has nine offices in six countries and serves more than 100,000 customers

MySQL.ita: MySQL o Oracle MySQL è un relational database management system (RDBMS) composto da un client a riga di comando e un server. Entrambi sono multipiattaforma[2] e sono disponibi ufficialmente su praticamente tutte le distribuzioni conosciute, come Debian, Ubuntu e CentOS[3], sebbene lo abbiano sostanzialmente sostituito con MariaDB a partire dal 2012.
MySQL.eng: MySQL is a database system used by many websites on the Internet. It is based on SQL. Many ways of doing things in SQL are similar in MySQL. The data is structured in tables in MySQL. And to extract data from the tables queries are used.For example: SELECT id_number FROM main_database WHERE name='John',This query will return the 'id_number' of the person named 'John' from the table named 'main_database'.

Oracle SQL Developer.ita: Oracle SQL Developer è un ambiente di sviluppo integrato per lavorare con SQL nei database Oracle. Oracle Corporation fornisce questo prodotto gratuitamente; utilizza il Java Development Kit
Oracle SQL Developer.eng: Oracle SQL Developer is an Integrated development environment (IDE) for working with SQL in Oracle databases. Oracle Corporation provides this product free; it uses the Java Development Kit.

Oracle Database.ita: Oracle Database è uno tra i più famosi software di database management system sviluppato da Oracle Corporation. Scritto in linguaggio C, che fa parte dei cosiddetti RDBMS ovvero di sistemi di database basati sul modello relazionale affermatosi come standard di riferimento dei database dell'ultimo decennio
Oracle Database.eng: Oracle Database (commonly referred to as Oracle DBMS, Oracle Autonomous Database, or simply as Oracle) is a multi-model[4] database management system produced and marketed by Oracle Corporation. It is a database commonly used for running online transaction processing (OLTP), data warehousing (DW) and mixed (OLTP & DW) database workloads

MySql vs Oracle DB.eng: MySQL and Oracle SQL are both RDBMSs (relational database management systems) owned by Oracle Corporation. MySQL is built to be primarily free and open-source, while Oracle is primarily built to be commercial and paid. MySQL is also more customizable than Oracle which is because Oracle is a finished product

TypeScript.ita: TypeScript è un linguaggio di programmazione open source sviluppato da Microsoft. Si tratta di un'estensione di JavaScript che basa le sue caratteristiche su ECMAScript 6
TypeScript.eng: TypeScript is JavaScript with syntax for types. TypeScript is a strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript, giving you better tooling at any scale

Full Stack.ita: Il full stack developer è un programmatore che conosce tutti gli aspetti della programmazione, sia frontend che backend
Full Stack.eng: Full stack technology refers to the entire depth of a computer system application, and full stack developers straddle two separate web development domains: the front end and the back end. The front end includes everything that a client, or site viewer, can see and interact with

Docker.ita: Docker è un popolare software libero progettato per eseguire processi informatici in ambienti isolabili, minimali e facilmente distribuibili chiamati container Linux, con l'obiettivo di semplificare i processi di deployment di applicazioni software
Docker.eng: Docker is an open source containerization platform. It enables developers to package applications into containers—standardized executable components combining application source code with the operating system (OS) libraries and dependencies required to run that code in any environment

Principal Skills: Competenze funzionali:, Buona conoscenza dei processi di bidding,Conoscenza del mercato elettrico Italiano,Conoscenza del processo di settlement, Competenze tecniche:,Full Stack,CD/CI Management,Docker (container env),Technology Architect ,Configuration & Release Management   ,Suite Atlassian (Jira, Confluence, Bamboo),MySQL   ,Oracle SQL Developer   ,Oracle Database   ,J2EE,Spring MVC (Model View Controller),Spring Boot   ,Restful API,JavaScript ,TypeScript Programming Language   ,Angular,React,HTML (Hypertext Markup Language)     ,Cascading Style Sheets (CSS),Python,Blockchain, Competenze trasversali generali:,capacità di lavorare in team ed in autonomia; ,capacità di comunicazione e interazione con untenti finali;,capaictà di organizzazione e gestione del tempo nel rispetto delle tempistiche progettuali e con orientamento all'obiettivo,conoscenza delle motodologie di delivery sia in modalità Waterfall che Agile Scrum,conoscenza delle architetture di base,rtificazioni:,Certificazione Agile Scrum Developer (15.07.2019),Certificazione AWS Cloud (28.04.2021),Certificazione DevOps (30.11.2021)
